title: Korak 22

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Your __str__ method should return a string in the format title (year) - S seasons, N episodes, duration min avg, director.
tests.testString:
({
    test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
        
    series1 = TVSeries('Scrubs', 2001, 'Bill Lawrence', 24, 9, 182)
    print(series1)
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "Scrubs (2001) - 9 seasons, 182 episodes, 24 min avg, Bill Lawrence" in output
    `)
})

description: U klasi TVSeries, kreirajte metod __str__ koji vraća string sa sledećim formatom: title (year) - S seasons, N episodes, duration min avg, director, gde se title, year, S, N, duration, i director trebalo bi zameniti atributima title, year, seasons, total_episodes, duration i director po redosledu.
